findings.description: JP surface uses 'ISO14001' (no space) while glossary canonical form is 'ISO 14001' (with space). ZH and EN surfaces correctly use 'ISO 14001'. Creates glossary cross-reference key mismatch.
findings.recommendation: Normalize JP surface to 'ISO 14001' to match glossary canonical form

summary: Chunk 21 (pages 222-231) covers procurement planning/execution (調達計画・実施) and transitions to Development Technology chapter (p231). 121 trilingual leaves audited across 10 pages, 31 entities. L1 completeness: 100% PASS (no missing jp/zh/en). L3 formal quality: 100% PASS (no truncation, placeholders, or garbled chars). L2 semantic fidelity: 1 minor defect — p225 ISO14001 JP surface lacks space vs glossary canonical 'ISO 14001'. All 14 question answer_index values valid. 13/13 major terms consistent between page content and glossary. Page 230 is intentionally empty (blank page). Overall verdict: PASS with 1 minor cosmetic defect.
